name: Can I sue my employer if I fell from ladder at work?

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer if I fell from ladder at work?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, workers' comp is exclusive remedy against employer; no lawsuits.**

Suits only for gross negligence (rare) or third parties like ladder maker.[8]

- Comp limits employer liability.
- Intentional harm exception.
- UT/ID strict.

Focus on comp; explore others separately.
